# KickPool

> KickPool is a World Cup 2026 sweepstakes platform where friends predict match scores, watch live with real-time AI commentary, and get paid out automatically on Solana.

## Features

- Create and join group sweepstakes pools for any World Cup match
- Live score streaming powered by TxLINE on-chain data
- AI pundit commentary with Gemini
- Automatic Solana settlement via Merkle proof verification
- Predict scores with USDC entry fees

## Pages

- [Home](https://kickpool-khaki.vercel.app/): Browse open pools or create a new one
- [Register](https://kickpool-khaki.vercel.app/register): Create a free account
- [Login](https://kickpool-khaki.vercel.app/login): Sign in to your account
- [Create Pool](https://kickpool-khaki.vercel.app/pool/create): Start a new World Cup sweepstakes pool
- [Join Pool](https://kickpool-khaki.vercel.app/pool/join): Join with an invite code
- [About](https://kickpool-khaki.vercel.app/about): Learn more about KickPool
- [Privacy](https://kickpool-khaki.vercel.app/privacy): Privacy policy

## Tech Stack

- Next.js 16 frontend on Vercel
- Socket.io server on Railway
- PostgreSQL database
- Solana smart contracts via TxLINE
- Google Gemini AI commentary
